'''bazhubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coachspeak|coachspeak]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-zh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coachspeak|coachspeak]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| bazhubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæzhibith|bæzhibith]] || [[word:bæzhibij|bæzhibij]] || [[word:bæzhibish|bæzhibish]] || [[word:bæzhibi|bæzhibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bazhuzhubuth|bazhuzhubuth]] || [[word:bazhuzhubuj|bazhuzhubuj]] || [[word:bazhuzhubush|bazhuzhubush]] || [[word:bazhuzhubu|bazhuzhubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bazhubuth|bazhubuth]] || [[word:bazhubuj|bazhubuj]] || [[word:bazhubush|bazhubush]] || [[word:bazhubu|bazhubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bazhufbuth|bazhufbuth]] || [[word:bazhufbuj|bazhufbuj]] || [[word:bazhufbush|bazhufbush]] || [[word:bazhufbuf|bazhufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bazhubuthu|bazhubuthu]] || [[word:bazhubuju|bazhubuju]] || [[word:bazhubushu|bazhubushu]] || [[word:bazhubuku|bazhubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bazhubuth|bazhubuth]] || [[word:bazhubuj|bazhubuj]] || [[word:bazhubush|bazhubush]] || [[word:bazhubu|bazhubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bazhubuthul|bazhubuthul]] || [[word:bazhubujul|bazhubujul]] || [[word:bazhubushul|bazhubushul]] || [[word:bazhubukul|bazhubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bazhubuthuthu|bazhubuthuthu]] || [[word:bazhubujuju|bazhubujuju]] || [[word:bazhubushushu|bazhubushushu]] || [[word:bazhubuku|bazhubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bazhubuthun|bazhubuthun]] || [[word:bazhubujun|bazhubujun]] || [[word:bazhubushun|bazhubushun]] || [[word:bazhubukun|bazhubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bazhubuthuoro|bazhubuthuoro]] || [[word:bazhubujuoro|bazhubujuoro]] || [[word:bazhubushuoro|bazhubushuoro]] || [[word:bazhubukuoro|bazhubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
